'''thajodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradungulid|gradungulid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradungulid|gradungulid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thajodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæjedheth|thæjedheth]] || [[word:thæjedhej|thæjedhej]] || [[word:thæjedhesh|thæjedhesh]] || [[word:thæjedhe|thæjedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thajojodhoth|thajojodhoth]] || [[word:thajojodhoj|thajojodhoj]] || [[word:thajojodhosh|thajojodhosh]] || [[word:thajojodho|thajojodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajodhoth|thajodhoth]] || [[word:thajodhoj|thajodhoj]] || [[word:thajodhosh|thajodhosh]] || [[word:thajodho|thajodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajofdhoth|thajofdhoth]] || [[word:thajofdhoj|thajofdhoj]] || [[word:thajofdhosh|thajofdhosh]] || [[word:thajofdhof|thajofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thajodhotho|thajodhotho]] || [[word:thajodhojo|thajodhojo]] || [[word:thajodhosho|thajodhosho]] || [[word:thajodhoko|thajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thajodhoth|thajodhoth]] || [[word:thajodhoj|thajodhoj]] || [[word:thajodhosh|thajodhosh]] || [[word:thajodho|thajodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thajodhothol|thajodhothol]] || [[word:thajodhojol|thajodhojol]] || [[word:thajodhoshol|thajodhoshol]] || [[word:thajodhokol|thajodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thajodhothotho|thajodhothotho]] || [[word:thajodhojojo|thajodhojojo]] || [[word:thajodhoshosho|thajodhoshosho]] || [[word:thajodhoko|thajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thajodhothon|thajodhothon]] || [[word:thajodhojon|thajodhojon]] || [[word:thajodhoshon|thajodhoshon]] || [[word:thajodhokon|thajodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thajodhothoro|thajodhothoro]] || [[word:thajodhojoro|thajodhojoro]] || [[word:thajodhoshoro|thajodhoshoro]] || [[word:thajodhokoro|thajodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
